playbook.intent: All 2-10 devs reference the same playbook set; company-specific overlays (security policy, ADR template, RFC format, internal tech-radar) cleanly shadow faion defaults without forking the corpus
playbook.scope: All 2-10 devs reference the same playbook set; company-specific overlays (security policy, ADR template, RFC format, internal tech-radar) cleanly shadow faion defaults without forking the corpus

success-criteria.criterion: All 4 stages have written outputs in the project record
Each stage's decision gate was answered before advancing (yes / no in writing)
Final stage produced the required written decision artifact
Every methodology reference loaded cleanly via `faion get-content`

stage.name: Pilot the Adoption

tasks.task: Pick a single squad to pilot Faion across SDD + playbooks
Install Faion plugin + CLI in their workflows
Pick the 3 workflows where Faion will be measured

stage.decision-gate: Advance only when the pilot squad is using Faion daily for 1 week.

stage.name: Define Company Overrides
stage.intent: Where company standards diverge from Faion defaults.

tasks.task: List company conventions that override Faion (linters, formats, naming)
Encode them as company-local skills / playbooks layered on top of Faion

stage.decision-gate: Advance when overrides are encoded and not just described.

stage.name: Roll Out Org-Wide

tasks.task: Roll out squad-by-squad with the same install runbook
Train each squad on the override registry

stage.decision-gate: Advance only when ≥80% of squads are on the same install + overrides.

stage.name: Measure & Iterate

tasks.task: Measure cycle-time, escape-rate, and dev-satisfaction deltas
Iterate overrides where Faion default + company default conflict

stage.decision-gate: Required output: a written go-forward decision with data.
